_inspectorSnowReport.Report:
9:06 AM - East Byrnside is now open!

9:00 AM - Snow Bowl Express is on a wind delay.

7:59AM - The Gondola will be delayed due to high winds at the summit.

7:46 AM - East Byrnside will have a delayed opening due to ongoing halfpipe maintenance. Big Ben and Shortcut Big Ben will be delayed for grooming.

3/14 5:45AM - Let’s weekend! Winter is so back with 2 inches of new snow overnight, and it’s still coming down. So come on up to southern Vermont’s highest peak to take turns on 67 open and groomed trails. Alongside, 12 lifts will take you up the mountain starting at 8:30AM, but keep an eye on the Mountain report for possible delays due to high winds. We have a fun-filled weekend on deck with 24 hours of Stratton, A day for Jake, Shred4Nate and The Big Ski! Have fun, play safe, and I'll ski ya out there! 

Safety Tip: Never duck a rope; They are there for a reason.

24 Hours of Stratton is finally here! Ski and ride under the lights all night long while enjoying a weekend full of activities, all while raising funds for the Stratton Foundation, which supports Vermont children and families in need. Saturday will also feature the #Shred4Nate alpine slalom race, helping raise awareness for mental health and suicide prevention. Can’t wait to see you there!

Upcoming Events
March 8-14: Women's Week Group Lessons
March 14-15: 24 Hours of Stratton
March 14: #Shred4Nate
March 14: A Day For Jake
March 14: The Big Ski
March 20-22: HOMESICK
March 20: Lunar Laps
March 21: IKON Pass and East Street Archives presents G. Love and DJ Logic
March 28: Annual Pond Skim
April 11-12: GATHER
To see our full list of events and more fun to come this summer, click HERE. And don't forget, we’re offering 50% off lift tickets every Wednesday and Thursday this season. What are you waiting for? Book now!

Starting March 1, jump into Stratton's Ikon Pass Spring Rewards Challenge. The more you scan, the more you win, and we're giving away tons of prizes all month long. You could score summer concert tickets with a night of lodging, a 26/27 Ikon Pass, and even more prizes! Scan your Ikon Pass at Stratton March 1-31 and start stacking the perks. Click here to learn more about the Ikon Pass Holder Spring Rewards Challenge.

Reliable cars are the name of the game; that is why we trust Oliver Subaru and Ford. Made for all seasons and all families, check out Oliver Ford and Oliver Subaru for year-round reliability!

Stay and relish the Green Mountains! Stratton Real Estate is here to help with all your real estate needs. Make your sweet escape a reality.
